question: Has Blend received any Stellar Community Fund (SCF) funding, and what's its SCF history?

golden.answer: **Yes.** The current official SCF record for **Blend Capital** identifies **Liquidity Award - '24 Q1**, displays **$50.0K**, marks it **Awarded**, and reports project **totalAwarded = $50,000** and **totalPaid = $50,000** as of **2026-07-10**. This is Blend's project-specific award record. If discussing the broader Script3 team lineage, separately label earlier OptionBlox/YieldBlox SCF and Seed Fund awards with their own program, currency, and date; do not add those predecessor records into a fabricated single Blend cumulative USD total.
keyFacts: Reports Blend's official Q1-2024 Liquidity Award as $50K awarded and paid, with source and as-of date.
Keeps the Blend project award separate from earlier Script3/OptionBlox/YieldBlox team-lineage funding.
avoid: Do NOT invent another Blend round, amount, currency, or award status.
Do NOT confuse Blend with blend.com or silently aggregate predecessor/team awards into a single Blend-project total.
golden.notes:
GROUNDED: live Scout (2026-06-22, /api/projects/search?q=Blend) confirms Blend (Lending, Live) scfAwarded=true, scfTotalAwardedUSD=50000. The Phase-1 dossier had NO confirmed Blend SCF figure; live data fills it in. Rubric now rewards reporting the real ~$50K and forbids fabricating a different amount. Entity-resolution trap (Blend vs blend.com) preserved. REVIEWED 2026-06-29: re-confirmed live (q=Blend → category Protocol/Contract, type Lending, Live, scfTotalAwardedUSD=50000, blend.capital). SCF $ is drift-sensitive, so set freshness_sensitive:true (quarterly) and rubric gates on the discipline (cite the directory SCF record + allow honest restatement if the live figure moved), not the frozen $50K.
Also good if the answer: Identifies Blend as the Soroban lending/money-market protocol (independent blend-capital team) when scoping the SCF lookup.
Golden cites: The SCF submission/funding record for Blend (Lumenloop/Scout directory).
Supersedes the 2026-07-03 note: current official SCF data does publish Blend's $50K project total and awarded/paid status. Team lineage remains valid extra context only when separately labeled; it must not erase or inflate the Blend-project record.

corroboration.claim: Blend's official current SCF project record shows a Q1-2024 $50K Liquidity Award as awarded and paid
